text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while walking around campus, I hear a
familiar voice... but saying some very unfamiliar
words.

text_block_list.name: Cat-Lover Umamusume?
text_block_list.text:
Meeeowww... What a cute widdle kittyyy! So
cuuute, yes you are!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Cats really take away all the exhausti—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Can you take away Trainer's memory too, Mr.
Cat?! Please?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I figured as much. You're just a little kitty!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Ughhhh... I can't... I'm even more tired now...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She appears exhausted and low on energy. I
wonder if I should reconsider her race schedule
for the sake of her future success.
